page.title: Supreme Chaos Records · Unique Underground Music
page.meta_description: Your underground metal label. Exclusive vinyl releases, CDs, and merchandise in the genres of doom metal, death metal, hard rock, stoner rock, and more. This is all about unique music!

open_graph.title: Supreme Chaos Records · Unique Underground Music
open_graph.description: Your underground metal label. Exclusive vinyl releases, CDs, and merchandise in the genres of doom metal, death metal, hard rock, stoner rock, and more. This is all about unique music!

page.title: Supreme Chaos Records · The Label
page.meta_description: Supreme Chaos Records is an independent metal label dedicated to raw intensity and artistic diversity. From blackened fury to progressive and experimental sounds, we support bands that redefine the boundaries of heavy music.

open_graph.description: Supreme Chaos Records is an independent metal label dedicated to raw intensity and artistic diversity. From blackened fury to progressive and experimental sounds, we support bands that redefine the boundaries of heavy music.

page.title: Chaos Team · Supreme Chaos Records
page.meta_description:
Here’s a bit about our team. We’re all nerds and music lovers ourselves, and we adore vinyl, cassettes and special edition CDs. That’s why you’ll find quite a eclectic mix of styles here – after all, each of us has our own unique taste.

page.title: Supreme Chaos Record Café · Supreme Chaos Records
page.meta_description: The first Supreme Chaos Plattencafé will take place on May 3rd 2025 in Ibbenbüren at Headquarter / Werk II. 14:00-18:30 Time for music nerd talk, coffee and more.
